calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2019 Continued To Dec-18-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-05-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants OP Ventures International, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company and Ben Cannon.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Sydney E. Fairbairn, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Western Gravel Roofing Supply, Inc.
Eugene Lee, General Manager of Western Gravel Roofing Supply, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants OP Ventures International, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company or Ben Cannon.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on February 8, 2019.
Substitute service on defendant OP Ventures International, LLC occurred on March 1, 2019 and was effectuated on March 14, 2019.
Substitute service on defendant Ben Cannon occurred on March 1, 2019 and was effectuated on March 14, 2019.
Default as to both defendants was entered on May 24, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 24, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Western Gravel Roofing Supply, Inc., and against the defaulted defendants OP Ventures International, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company and Ben Cannon, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - 656.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $585.00.
Total - $29,066.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2019 Continued To Nov-06-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
